title: Consolidate config files (delete duplicates, standardize on app.config.ts)
description: Two divergent config systems: src/config.ts and src/config/app.config.ts. Plus src/config/index.ts and src/config.js. Standardize on src/config/app.config.ts. Delete: src/config.ts, src/config/index.ts, src/config.js. Update all 5+ files that import from old config to use app.config.ts. Add a barrel export at src/config/index.ts that re-exports from app.config.ts for backward compat.
validation: All imports of `./config/app.config` work. No import from `./config` (old) or `./config.js` remains.
